entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Implied source of activity/health data based on metrics like steps, floors, active zone minutes, and the 'source' field pattern

entities.name: Activity Summary Database
entities.context: SQLite/SQL database storing daily activity summaries with upsert-on-conflict logic keyed by date

entities.name: Active Zone Minutes
entities.context: Fitbit-specific metric tracking time in fat burn, cardio, and peak heart rate zones

entities.name: Daily Activity Tracking
entities.context: V tracks daily physical activity metrics including steps, distance, floors, elevation, calories, and activity intensity minutes

relationships.context: Fitbit activity data is ingested into the database via this upsert query
Active Zone Minutes (fat burn, cardio, peak) is a Fitbit-proprietary metric
Daily activity tracking is persisted via SQL upsert keyed on date with conflict resolution
